title: Payload — cypherx.tenant.created
description: Contract 13 tenant-lifecycle payload. Emitted by Auth (regardless of upstream source) when a new tenant is provisioned. Each service's `bootstrap-tenant` consumer seeds default rows (tenant_config, plan, quotas — see Contract 19). Carried inside the Kafka event envelope `payload` field. Forward-compatible: tolerates unknown fields (additionalProperties:true).

tenant_id.description: Isolation-boundary UUID of the newly created tenant (Contract 13). Owned by Auth.

source.description: Provisioning source persisted on `auth.tenants.source`. All sources are equivalent at the data and policy layer; no service may special-case `px0-bridge`.

plan.description: Initial subscription/quota plan for the tenant (optional at creation time).

created_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (millisecond precision) at which the tenant was created.
